B. S Dr Shwetha S Kamat Dr. Rekha Kumari Gallery Blogs Contact Us + Make Appointment Welcome to Vivan Bone & Women Care + learn more + Our services Vivan Bone & Women Care + learn more + Our services About Us Vivan Bone & Women Care. Fellow ship in Spine Surgery Fellow ship in minimal invasive gynaecology & infertility The clinic has a state of the art USG-Scan machine & digital X-Ray facilities. It is also tied up
                            with renowned lab facilities where it is a NABL approved centre. There are facilities for minor procedure which can be done with local anaesthesia for both the specialities.
                            The clinic is also equipped with NST Machine facilities for foetal monitoring. We as a organisation
                            strive for best care for our patients and hence have tied to give all the outpatient facilities
                            under one roof. Come experience the treatment if you need any kind of Women/Bone issue you are suffering. VIVAN BONE & WOMEN CARE was started in the year 2015 by renowned doctors Dr. Varun G.B.S. & Dr. Shwetha
                            S Kamath. They started their medical studies at M S Ramaiah Medical College, Bangalore and went
                            on to do their Masters in Orthopaedics and Obstetrics & Gyanecology respectively. The services
                            provided by the vivan clinic are Fracture Management, Arthritis Management, Osteoporosis Management, Spine Care, Orthopedic Trauma,
                            Physiotherapy, Second Opinions, Splints & Appliances Orthopedics Our orthopedic service offers consultation, inpatient management and outpatient treatment for patients with disorders of the musculoskeletal system. Obstetrics & Gynecology Obstetrics and gynecology is concerned with the care of pregnant woman, her unborn child and
                                the management of diseases specific to women. Opening Hours Mon - wed 06:00 pm - 09:00 pm Thur - sat 06:00 pm - 09:00 pm Sunday Closed Our Departments Managed Your Heathcare Services Orthopedic Our orthopedic service offers consultation, inpatient management and outpatient treatment for
                                patients with disorders of the musculoskeletal system Obstetrics & Gyanecology Obstetrics and gynecology is concerned with the care of pregnant woman, her unborn child and
                                the management of diseases specific to women. The specialty combines medicine and surgery. Physiotherapy Physiotherapy is a science-based profession and takes a ‘whole person’ approach to health and
                                wellbeing, which includes the patient’s general lifestyle. Our Doctors Dr Varun G. B. S MBBS, MS - Ortho, FIS, Joint Replacement,Spine surgeon 13 years experience overall + Know More Dr Shwetha S Kamat MBBS, MS - OBG,FMIS Laparoscopic,IVF Specialist 12 years experience overall + Know More Dr. Vaibhavi sree jagdeesh PT, COMT, YIC Physiotherapist 5 years experience overall + Know More Treatements Which we provide are Laparoscopy Procedure Learn More Hysteroscopy Learn More Ovulation Induction and Fertility Treatment Learn More IUI Learn More IVF Learn More ICSI Learn More PESA, TESA Learn More Third Party Reproduction Learn More Testimonials I was suffering from severe stomach pain and heavy bleeding for last 10 years .I was postponing
                                seeking medical care for long time then I met Dr Shwetha through practo. she diagnosed that
                                I have endometriosis.we tried .... but it was elident work .So she removed the uterus laparoscopically.I
                                havent been more happy in my life.I had forgotten what is it to be painfree.I thank to Dr
                                Shwetha for all that she has done for me Uterus removal I was consulting Dr shwetha through out pregnancy.She was available for queries and emergency.My
                                pregnancy and delivery was smooth ride and had vaccum delivery but everything was fine.Dr
                                Shwetha is a complete doctor very knowledgeable and skilled. Pregnancy and delivery I have been married for 10 yrs.I had bought multiple fertility treatments including IVF and totally
                                given up hope on concieving.I consulted Dr shwetha for period problems.She assured me that
                                pregnancy is possible ...Thanks to her I am blessed with twins.Do believe and consult Dr
                                shwetha for any fertility problem Infertility Dr Varun is so friendly and patiently explains the problem without making a big deal out of it.
                                He tries out basic treatment first, and encourages to bring out certain lifestyle changes,
                                teaches exercises which will help soothe pain and solve the condition to a huge extent without
                                jumping right into any major treatments. Dr Varun is certainly good at what he does, 10/10
                                recommend him! Smriti I had visited Dr Shwetha for my delivery. It was a high risk pregnancy. She has also done my
                                cervical cerclage procedure.Dr Shwetha was very friendly and supportive during the entire
                                pregnancy.She was always a call away and replied to all my queries patiently.During a family
                                emergency I had to travel to Delhi, she was available on call even then.I am overall very
                                satisfied with her treatment and felt I was in good hands.Would definitely recommend the
                                doctor. Aditi Bhatia I have been going to Dr. Varun for the last 5yrs, every time I have been to him I always found
                                a solution & never had to go back to him with a similar problem except for my plantarfascia
                                treatment, though my pain has come down to a very large extent I need to reduce my body weight
                                to get rid of it completely which am working on. I have also recommended my friend who is
                                an ayurvedic Dr herself who was ailing from legament issue for years. She had difficulty
                                walking & use to cry today after Dr. Varun operated on her she goes for jogging & is very
                                happy. I personally would recommend Dr. Varun to all my friends very strongly. I wish him
                                many more years of service. Raj Kumar Visited Shwetha S Kamath for my Mother's Umbelical hernia treatment. Doctor explained the problem
                                very well and gave us the confidence to go ahead with the operation. It's been 2 weeks since
                                the operation and my mother is healing well. I liked that she cares about her patients and
                                their well-being. Mangala N I am glad and happy that I have meet dr Varun GBS because I been suffering from tennis elbow
                                pain for many years I gone to through many treatment with many doctors but not got cured
                                but finally I meet thise doctor and cured and perfectly fn and had last one year back i meet
                                with an accident and I had to get operated and same doctor I meet and finally I got cured,
                                the doctor is so friendly and so concerned with patients health allot , i am so thank full
                                to the doctor. Aishwarayaa HN The operation was success, and my entire family was very happy with the outcome. My mom started
                                walking from day 2 and she looks quite normal as if there is no operation done and all my
                                relatives are surprised with such a fast recovery. My family is very thankful to doctor Swetha
                                Kamath for making it such a smooth transition. Overall doctor Swetha Kamath is very skillful,
                                and people can blindly believe on her, and she will take care everything. Also, doctor is
                                reachable on phone and messages which makes us ever more comfortable. Once again thank you
                                very much Doctor . Ganesh Mucherla I have been going to Dr. Varun for the last 5yrs, every time I have been to him I always found
                                a solution & never had to go back to him with a similar problem except for my plantarfascia
                                treatment, though my pain has come down to a very large extent I need to reduce my body weight
                                to get rid of it completely which am working on. I have also recommended my friend who is
                                an ayurvedic Dr herself who was ailing from legament issue for years. She had difficulty
                                walking & use to cry today after Dr. Varun operated on her she goes for jogging & is very
                                happy. I personally would recommend Dr. Varun to all my friends very strongly. I wish him
                                many more years of service. Aditi Bhatia Doctor is very kind & his treatment is best i must say from many days we were looking for her
                                treatment showed to many doctors but didnt receive dt good treatment frm any doctor she was
                                suffering from but by his medicines realy worked on herall thanks to him.He is very good
                                at his profession. Vinita I visited Dr Swetha Kamath for my wife .She was recommended by my wife's sister .To start with
                                my wife had some irregular periods , so we consulted her also we had issues conseiving.From
                                day one she was very polite and guided us , withing one month of consultation my wife conseived
                                naturally. The whole journey till the birth of my baby was very comfortable because of her
                                guidance .She has a lot of patience and will always be there when you ask her doubts in WhatsApp
                                even if several times without getting irritated.To end with it was a great journey . Shriyans Choudhuri The doctor was friendly. explained to us the medical condition really well. overall we had a
                                good experience. Swaroop narayanan I am very thankful to Dr. Shwetha for the smooth delivery experience. The overall experience
                                was very good, she was always available over the call and whatsApp. Dr Shwetha understand
                                and give proper time to each patient. The way she explain things is commendable. Shubham priya Doctor was very good in treating the pain. He is very polite and understands the problem and
                                gives the proper medicine. Clinic. Staff and setup is also excellent.Would definitely recommend
                                him for your joint pains Astha We consulted Dr.Shwetha Kamath from the first month of my pregnancy. Dr.Shwetha Kamath listens
                                to our doubts/queries patiently and clarifies them in detail.She has provided valuable suggestions,
                                precautions to be taken from the start of the pregnancy. Doctor was accessible anytime either
                                through consultation or through WhatsApp/calls.Doctor gave me confidence and courage that
                                she is there anytime in case of emergency. I delivered baby girl in July 2021 through c section
                                and we both are doing good.Post delivery recovery is also quick. We are very happy that we
                                consulted Dr.Shwetha Kamath for our first pregnancy.Thanks a lot doctor for you care and
                                support. We would definitely recommend her Rama B He listened to all my problems patiently and gave me confidence.I had multiple ankle fracture
                                where many doctors i consulted told me that ill be limping all my life but Dr.Varun operated
                                and today i am walking fine. In todays world many doctors won't hear to patient's problem
                                clearly. He is very humble doctor. Doctor was very good in treating the pain. He is very polite and understands the problem and
                                gives the proper medicine. Clinic. Staff and setup is also excellent.Would definitely recommend
                                him for your joint pains Astha I visited Doctor Shwetha for the first time in Feb 2020. There was a complication with my first
                                pregnancy and we had to abort in the first week itself. I was very disheartened and disturbed.
                                Doctor took care of the procedure very smoothly and supported me through the procedure patiently.
                                When I was on the labour bed, there was a time i couldn't push. But doctor Shwetha came to
                                me like an angel. My husband tells me the Doctor rolled up her sleeves up, got on to the
                                side of the delivery bed and helped me push the baby out literally. Now I have a beautiful
                                baby boy. I cannot thank the doctor enough for all her efforts for being such a big support
                                throughout my pregnancy. I recommend the doctor to all the would be mommy's out there Aysha shaikh His clinic timings are very convenient, His emphasis on physical activity along with medicines
                                is helping me improve my health and get rid of pain significantly” Bhavani M S When the journey started it was all Scary. But, once we went to her room all our sorrows were
                                removed. She gave us confidence at each stage. With never ending complications during whole
                                pregnancy I.e. Wife's health condition, baby growth issues and Covid for wife. Everytime
                                she took the personal care and helped us at each level. Gave us to confidence for smooth
                                delivery. Rajasekhar Naik Dr. Shwetha is very straight forward in her approach towards the treatment. We had been trying
                                to get pregnant for nearly 7-8 years and consulting different doctors, with no result. She
                                understood our health status and provided the right treatment plan, which helped us conceive
                                quickly and now we proud and happy parents of a beautiful baby girl. During the course of
                                the pregnancy we had multiple issues and throughout this process, she has been very patient
                                in helping us over come some of the biggest hurdles and guiding us to a safe and healthy
                                pregnancy culminating in the birth of our child. Madanraj Rajgopal I stated visiting Dr.Shwetha from 14th week of pregnancy. And I must say the positivity and confidence
                                with she treats is just amazing.She gives enough time to answer all the queries patients
                                have during each visit.And also she is available any time over call and whatsapp .She listens
                                to every problem very carefully and patiently and provides the right solution. I would like
                                to thank Dr. Shwetha for supporting throughout my pregnancy and delivery. Suma Rao Ma Shaa Allah I had visited many doctors but I am very must satisfied by this doctor the way
                                he explains and gives good treatment Dr swetha kamath is very kind and humble ,soft spoken,problem solving person.I had issues from
                                past 5 years in getting pregnant.she underwent and looked my problem in depth and gave the
                                right treatment with in a year i am blessed with baby boy i am really very happy visiting
                                Dr swetha kamath. I recommend every couple who has issues in getting pregnant to visit her
                                and share their problems with her. Thonduru Irfan I have consulted Dr. Shwetha Kamath with minor complications in the first month of pregnancy,
                                she gave me hope and made my pregnancy journey very smooth. She always made sure to answer
                                all our queries and was always approachable at any hour. Would definitely recommend Dr. Shwetha
                                Kamath for anyone who is looking for pleasant pregnancy journey. Kamakshi + View More Our Gallery Our videos play play play + See More RT Nagar, Bangalore 129, 4th Main Road, CBI Road, Ganganagar, Landmark: Opposite SBI Bank, Bangalore vivanboneandwomencare@gmail.com Quick Links HOME ABOUT US DEPARTMENT GALLERY BLOGS CONTACT US Opening Hours Monday - Saturday 06:00 pm - 09:00 pm Sunday Closed Location © Vivan Bone And Women Care, All Rights Reserved Developed by Appaddindia Pvt Ltd
